_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to analyze organizational policies and documentation for appropriate use and user privileges as they apply to networking devices.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in writing technical documentation for data systems, including architecture diagrams, API specifications, operational runbooks, data dictionaries, and troubleshooting guides that enable team independence.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-S-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-S-002 (RC, cosine: 0.519), RC-A-001 (RC, cosine: 0.516).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.545). Shared vocabulary: [documentation]. DCWF-only terms [ability, analyze, apply, appropriate, devices, networking] vs WIDAI-only terms [api, architecture, data, diagrams, dictionaries, enable] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.866, R=0.857). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DCWF element and 24-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (81.7%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Ability to analyze organizational policies and documentation for appropriate use" and "Skill in writing technical documentation for data systems, including architectur". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.531 ≈ STS 0.545 (gap 0.014). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [documentation] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.1%. Shared tokens: [documentation]. DCWF-only: [ability, analyze, apply, appropriate, devices, networking]. WIDAI-only: [api, architecture, data, diagrams, dictionaries, enable].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 81.7% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
